scripts.db:migrations:apply: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && pnpm db:migrations:apply && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml

DB.description: D1 database for ME3 Core owner profile, assistant messages, and install metadata. Cloudflare should provision this during template deploy.

ME3_USER_AGENT.description: Durable Object namespace for the future per-owner ME3 agent runtime.

AI.description: Optional Workers AI binding. If you do not use Workers AI, configure OpenAI or Anthropic keys after install.

SITE_ASSETS.description: Optional R2 bucket binding for large public site media. D1 remains the default for small Core installs.

JWT_SECRET.description: Generate a random auth signing secret, for example `openssl rand -base64 32`.

TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Generate a 32-byte base64 key for encrypting owner/provider tokens, for example `openssl rand -base64 32`.

ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_CODE.description: Generate a one-time local owner bootstrap code, for example `openssl rand -hex 16`.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional owner-supplied OpenAI API key for chat/model providers.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional owner-supplied Anthropic API key for Claude/model providers.
